title: 🩺 Meet the Scannability Doctor!
message: Never save a broken design again. We've built an intelligent, real-time design auditor that verifies your custom QR code colors, contrasts, and logos are 100% readable before you print or share.
points: 🩺 Scannability Doctor Engine: A new dedicated checker that calculates relative color luminance contrast on a single tap[cite: 4].
🚦 Real-Time Safety Ratings: Instantly get clear status updates like 100% Fully Verified Scannable, Warning, or High Scan Failure Risk[cite: 4].
🚀 Optimized UI Badges: Redesigned diagnostic headers with full screen-breathing space to prevent layout compression or horizontal overflows[cite: 4].

title: 🎛️ Layout Fine-Tuning Studio!
message: Ultimate design freedom is here. We've added precise spacing and padding sliders so you can craft perfectly balanced, professional QR code artwork.
points: 🎛️ Fine-Tuning Studio: A new expandable workbench to adjust your layouts in real-time.
📐 Pixel-Perfect Spacing: Complete slider control over Frame Padding, Banner Gaps, and Global Card Margins.
🖼️ Zero Overlaps: Keep your branding banners cleanly separated from your QR data matrix perfectly.
⚙️ Migration Safety: Your custom spacing settings are securely saved to your history history log database seamlessly.

title: 🔒 Password Protected QRs!
message: Take control of your data with our biggest security update yet. Now you can lock your QR codes behind a secure password.
points: 🔐 Secret QRs: Password-protect URLs, Wi-Fi, Contacts, and more!
🖼️ Fresh Branding: Added beautiful new banner styles to make your QRs pop.
⚡ Faster History: We've optimized the history tab so your past creations load instantly.

title: 🔔 The Update Hub is Here!
message: We've added a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest tools and features.
points: ✨ In-App Notifications: See when new updates are available right from your home screen.
📖 Interactive Version History: Tap the checkmark icon to read past update notes anytime.
🚀 Performance Boost: Faster QR generation and smoother scrolling.
